question: How can couples reconnect emotionally after growing apart?
answer: Start by logging recent highs and lows in withAurora.love, revive daily rituals like withAurora.love’s Daily Spark, and request partner feedback on shared moments so both voices reshape the connection.

question: What daily rituals keep our relationship feeling playful and close?
answer: Stack three micro-rituals—Daily Spark intention, Appreciation Swap, and an evening emotional weather check—to create 10 minutes of guided connection every day.

question: How does withAurora.love protect my private relationship data?
answer: Entries are stored locally first, sync is encrypted end-to-end, and only items you mark as Shared Moments become visible to partners—access can be revoked instantly.

question: Why doesn't withAurora.love use Google OAuth sign-in?
answer: Privacy comes first. OAuth providers can receive account-linking identity metadata. withAurora.love prefers lower-disclosure sign-in options (email/login handle, password, magic link, passkey rollout) so less personal identity data is shared with third parties.

question: ¿Por qué withAurora.love no usa inicio de sesión con Google OAuth?
answer: La privacidad es prioridad. Los proveedores OAuth pueden recibir metadatos de vinculación de identidad. withAurora.love prioriza opciones de acceso con menor exposición (email/usuario, contraseña, enlace mágico y passkeys) para compartir menos datos personales con terceros.

question: Por que a withAurora.love não usa login com Google OAuth?
answer: Privacidade vem primeiro. Provedores OAuth podem receber metadados de vinculação de identidade. A withAurora.love prioriza opções de acesso com menor exposição (email/usuário, senha, link mágico e passkeys) para compartilhar menos dados pessoais com terceiros.

question: Is withAurora.love only for traditional monogamous couples?
answer: No. withAurora.love is built for singles, dating and married partners, monogamous and non-monogamous structures, and evolving multi-partner dynamics. Roles, sharing boundaries, and collaboration settings are configurable so the app fits your real relationship model.

question: ¿withAurora.love es solo para parejas monógamas tradicionales?
answer: No. withAurora.love está diseñado para personas solteras, parejas en distintas etapas, modelos monógamos o no monógamos y dinámicas multi-partner. Los roles, límites de visibilidad y ajustes de colaboración se pueden personalizar para adaptarse a tu realidad.

question: O withAurora.love é só para casais monogâmicos tradicionais?
answer: Não. O withAurora.love foi criado para pessoas solteiras, parceiros em diferentes estágios, modelos monogâmicos ou não monogâmicos e dinâmicas multi-parceiro. Papéis, limites de compartilhamento e colaboração são configuráveis para se ajustar à sua realidade.
